---
title: "Projects"
---

:::{.page-intro}
A growing collection of classwork, analyses, and portfolio projects.
:::

:::{.quick-grid}
:::{.quick-card}
### Analytics Work

Course projects, data analyses, and dashboards will appear here as they are finalized.
:::

:::{.quick-card}
### Business Applications

This section will highlight work that connects data analysis to business questions and decisions.
:::

:::{.quick-card}
### More Soon

I am still building out this portfolio, so more detailed project writeups are on the way.
:::
:::
